status_notes: Stub entity — resolution anchor so the operator pointer from secid:control/github.com/stuwrtlttle/cme resolves. Expand if/when more is known about the publisher.
notes: GitHub account publishing the Common Mitigation Enumeration (CME) prototype taxonomy (J. West, 2026). CME enumerates defensive controls and maps each to a deterministic CVSS environmental-score attenuation and to CWE weakness classes.

data.description: Taxonomy of defensive security controls mapped to deterministic CVSS environmental attenuation and CWE weakness classes. D3FEND-aligned tactics (Harden, Isolate, Detect, Evict, Restore).
